category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Chibi-Scheme as a minimal Scheme implementation for extension and scripting in C programs.
source_facts.description says Chibi-Scheme is a small footprint Scheme for use as a C extension language.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses the display name Chibi-Scheme.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is also an official documentation surface.
Official GitHub README links to the online manual at synthcode.com/scheme/chibi/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ashinn/chibi-scheme, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes Chibi-Scheme as a small library for extension and scripting in C programs.
source_facts.description identifies small-footprint Scheme for C extension use.
